headline: Borealis Foods Expands Access to Protein-Rich Chef Woo Noodles Through Costco
summary: Strong early demand reflects growing consumer interest in protein-rich convenient meals Chef Woo at Costco Chef Woo High-Protein Noodles featured on Costco social amid growing demand for convenient, protein-rich foods among consumers focused on weight management and nutrition. Each serving provides 20 grams of complete protein with all nine essential amino acids. NEW YORK, July 15, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Borealis Foods Inc.
